acceptedAnswer.text: New York family law AI Overviews favor dense, authoritative content due to competition; Chicago emphasizes procedural guides with faster citation turnover from mid-tier SEO.

suggestedAnswer.text: NY's market demands deeper E-E-A-T; Chicago rewards quick content wins. Both prioritize reviews. Firms in both cities track local biases for targeted optimization.
